Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11491 0 0}I-I-I don't have anything to talk about![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11491 0 0}Wh-Why are you talking to me if you don't have anything to say!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11404 0 0}{f 4 1}-san... Um... About what happened the other day...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}I, um... sort of overreacted... And I, um... just wanted to say I'm sorry.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}I get really nervous when I talk to people... although I know I should really do something about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11471 0 0}It... It's especially bad when I talk to boys... All I can think about is running away in that situation...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11472 0 0}T-True... I should've gone to an all-girls school.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}But I guess it's too late for that. And now I'll be here for almost three years...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I have to try harder to overcome this phobia.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11472 0 0}Oh god... That just makes me scared to even go outside.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}But... I can't stay afraid all my life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I have to try harder to overcome this phobia.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}S-Sorry, I know I can't perform my duties on the student council if I'm like this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I have to try harder to overcome this phobia.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}Although... the more I think about it, the more nervous I get...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}Although... the more I think about it, the more nervous I get...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11450 0 0}I hope I can get better at this somehow...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 4 -1 -1 0 0}U-U-U-Um, uh... This is so sudden, um...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}...I-I need to think about it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um, the other day, when you, um, invited me out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11463 0 0}Um, if it's okay with you, would you, um, like to...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}D-Do you have some time today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, would you like some company...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It seems like Chihiro wants[n]to walk home with me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]after school with her?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, but before that... do you mind if we stop by the library first?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}U-Um, this is kind of embarrassing, but... will you help me with my homework?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}It's math, to be specific... Let's talk about it more at the library.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 1 0}W-Would you like to come over to my house? It's a little far, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 1 0}W-Would you like to come over to my house? I don't think my mom will be in until late...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}There's no meeting today, so let's go ahead and use the student council room.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11410 0 0}...Never mind, it was nothing. What do you want?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}I didn't think you'd keep coming back...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}To be honest... it made me happy, seeing you care so much. I'm sorry I didn't say so sooner.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11404 0 0}Um... Maybe some other time, we could go out together?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The two of us made up![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should be able to invite her[n]out the next time I'm free...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}If that's how you feel, you should have behaved better to begin with.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Chihiro still won't open up to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I might have to try talking to her over a few[n]days before I can mend our relationship.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Ever since I met you, each day has been better than the last.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}Because of your support, I have the confidence to do anything...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11451 0 0}I hope I can help you, the same way you've helped me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with Chihiro...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}Ever since I met you, each day has been better than the last.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}I... I know I've caused a lot of trouble for many people up to now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}And I was very dependent on you solving my problems...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}But that's not going to happen again, not anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11451 0 0}I want people to rely on me, like they do the student council president... So wish me luck?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with Chihiro...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, the other day, when you, um, invited me out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, if it's okay with you, would you, um, like to...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}D-Do you have some time today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, by the way... are you on your way home?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, would you like some company...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}U-Um, I hope you did well on them. At least now the student council meetings can resume.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, would you like some company...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Are you on your way home now? Um, would you like some company...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um, actually... I'd like to stop by somewhere, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Could we go to the strip mall?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um... I'd like to ask you a favor if you have time today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um... I'd like to ask you a favor if you have time today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um... If you aren't busy, I was hoping that maybe we could walk home together...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, that reminds me... Did you make any plans today?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um... If you aren't busy, I was hoping that maybe we could walk home together...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}Th-Then... how about we have a chat at the café today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}Um... Do you have some time later today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}Um... Do you have some time later today?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um... Today, I'd like to go somewhere to relax and talk...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you don't mind... I'd like to join you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_071_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}Are you heading home now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}If you don't mind... I'd like to join you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_072_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}Then... could we stop by the strip mall? I was hoping to check out the bookstore...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um... I was thinking about visiting the bookstore again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}I know it might be a lost cause, but still...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_073_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}By the way, are you leaving now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um... I was thinking about visiting the bookstore again.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}I know it might be a lost cause, but still...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}To be honest... I was afraid to go by myself, but with you there, then even if someone bought it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 2 -1 -1 0 0}No, I should be more optimistic! Okay, let's go, {f 4 1}-san![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Are you free later today? I was hoping we could study together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11471 0 0}Well... I actually wanted to talk to you, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Are you free later today? I was hoping we could study together...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11454 0 0}Well... I actually wanted to talk to you, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11484 0 0}Oh, thank goodness... I was hoping you'd say yes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}I wonder if there's still room in the library... I'll go ahead and find us some seats![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}I'm sorry. I didn't want you to see me like this, but here we are...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}I was hoping we could walk home together today... Is that okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}Um, I was hoping we could walk home together today... Is that okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11434 0 0}Thank you... You're always so kind to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}...I want to get away from the school as quickly as possible. Shall we get going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}I was planning on leaving right after class, but I figured I should stop here first...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, {f 4 1}-san... Are you going home now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}I was planning on leaving right after class, but I figured I should stop here first...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}I feel a lot better with you around. Do you mind if we chat on our way back?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 1 0}...Sorry. All of a sudden, I'm starting to feel nervous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 1 0}...Sorry. All of a sudden, I'm starting to feel nervous.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Did you know that the student council has a street fundraiser every year?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm actually going to start prepping for it by making some flyers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11454 0 0}If you're free, do you think you could help me out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_082_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}Oh, are you going home now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Did you know that the student council has a street fundraiser every year?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}I'm actually going to start prepping for it by making some flyers.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}If you're free, do you think you could help me out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_083_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think she's willing to talk to me[n]anymore. I should try again another time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11444 0 0}O-Oh, I'm sorry. I should've known you had plans...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11444 0 0}Oh... Sorry, I shouldn't have assumed. Take care.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11444 0 0}Oh, I-I'm sorry. It's okay if you already had plans...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11471 0 0}O-Oh, sorry for imposing. Maybe another day then...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_091_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11444 0 0}Oh, I-I'm sorry. I didn't mean to bother you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11444 0 0}O-Oh, sorry. Don't worry about it. I didn't know you had plans.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_093_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}Maybe some other time, then... Just don't forget, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}That's okay. Whenever you're free is fine by me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_095_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}So... let's try again some other time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_096_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 11415 0 0}If there is anything I can do for you, please don't hesitate to ask, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EVENTPLAY
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Message issued by the script. [n]{f 1 5 0}Comm Event Replay.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_PERSPNA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel as if we can grow closer thanks to the[n]{f 2 4 2} Persona, {f 0 1 35}{f 2 4 5}{f 0 1 27}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel an unbreakable bond[n]with the elderly couple...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_RAN
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I might grow closer[n]to {f 2 4 0} soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_RANKUP
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I might grow closer[n]to the elderly couple soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_NOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think our bond will grow[n]any stronger even if I spend[n]more time with {f 2 4 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALMSG_BS_NORMAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I don't think our bond will grow[n]any stronger even if I spend[n]more time with them...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERALSELECTMSG_MAX
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem that our relationship[n]can get any closer than it is...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I still spend time with them...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_AS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_DT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day[n]with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND__GENERAL_MSG_NET
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend time online playing[n]the MMORPG with {f 2 4 0}...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_SOLO_NT
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the evening[n]with {f 2 4 0}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school with the {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_FASHION_
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time after[n]school at the fashion club?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the day at the bookstore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_BOOKSTOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend some time[n]after school at the bookstore?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_MSG_MULTIPLE
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Should I spend the night[n]with {f 2 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати на іспиті. Хороша робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати на іспиті. Хороша робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати на іспиті. Хороша робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати на іспиті. Хороша робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Here, this is from the chairman.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}It's a reward for effectively balancing schoolwork as well as our... ahem, "extracurricular activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати на іспиті. Хороша робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання навчання в школі та нашої... кхм, «позашкільної діяльності».[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}未使用ラベルです。[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати на іспиті. Хороша робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 6 -1 0 0}Це нагорода за ефективне поєднання навчання в школі та нашої... кхм, «позашкільної діяльності».[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Я бачила твої результати на іспиті. Хороша робота.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}It's admirable how you continue to excel in school while fighting arduous battle after battle.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4108 0 0}Я принесла тобі подарунок, щоб віддячити за твою сумлінну працю. Ось, тримай.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}DEV: UNUSED LABEL[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_GENERAL_EXAMREWARD_1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Since I placed at the top in the exams,[n]I also got this {f 4 4 1 37 1 3}.[n]{f 1 1}
